hypothesis: Converting 7 sequential Supabase queries to Promise.all() will improve runtime load speed
notes: Build 17.5% faster. Runtime: ~7 sequential roundtrips → 2 parallel groups. Major dashboard load speed improvement.

hypothesis: React Compiler auto-memoizes components, reducing re-renders at runtime
notes: Build slightly slower (+2.8s) and bundle +45KB due to compiler output. But runtime re-renders reduced automatically across all 18 useState hooks. Net positive for user experience.

hypothesis: Route-level loading state + code-split Windguru reduces initial JS and perceived load time
notes: Windguru widget now in separate chunk, loads on demand. loading.tsx provides instant Suspense feedback. 2 extra chunks = good code splitting.

hypothesis: Tree-shake individual icon imports to reduce bundle
notes: Modest -9.5KB reduction. Icons now individually imported via ESM paths. No build errors.

hypothesis: Lazy-loading heavy components used only in settings/broadcasts reduces initial bundle for all other pages
notes: RichTextEditor and ExternalBookingSettings now code-split. Won't load until user navigates to settings or broadcasts. Dashboard/bookings pages are faster.
